title: DSSSB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 1979 Junior Scientific Assistant, TGT, Data Entry Operator and Other Posts
description: Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 1979 Junior Scientific Assistant, TGT, Technical Assistant, Data Entry Operator, Lift Operator, and Other Posts. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, post-graduation, B.E/ B.Tech in Electrical Engineering, 10th Pass, 12th, ITI, Diploma, M.Sc and apply for the DSSSB Notification 2026 . Here, we provide more information about the age limit, selection process, salary struct...
